sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Game over - need to restart. Let me check the current state and try to restart by clicking somewhere
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 20:
        rs = [x for x,_ in n['boundary']]
        cs = [y for _,y in n['boundary']]
        center = ((min(rs)+max(rs))//2, (min(cs)+max(cs))//2)
        print(f"Square color={n['color']} center={center}")

for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] < 20:
        rs = [x for x,_ in n['boundary']]
        cs = [y for _,y in n['boundary']]
        center = ((min(rs)+max(rs))//2, (min(cs)+max(cs))//2)
        print(f"White px={n['pixels']} center={center}")

print("Game over state - need to restart level")
print("Valid actions:", valid_actions)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
